_note: Runtype collections used for dedupe + first-timer state. Records key on (type, name); the metadata schemas below are the intended shape. Also documented: the x_oauth record that holds rotating X OAuth2 tokens.

collections.description: Tracks announced push commit SHAs to prevent duplicate posts. Record name = commit SHA.
Tracks announced merged PRs. Record name = 'owner/repo#number'.
Tracks contributors seen before, to trigger a first-time contributor welcome. Record name = author login.

records.name: x_token
records._note: Holds the rotating X OAuth2 state. Seed clientId + refreshToken once (see x-seed-exchange). The x-post-auto flow fills accessToken/expiresAt and rotates refreshToken on every post. DO NOT commit real values.
